title: Fix video card to fit fully within mobile viewport height

requirements.text: Fix the VideoPostCard layout so the entire card — including the header (avatar, username, date), title, video, and action buttons — fits within the visible mobile viewport height without overflowing. The card height must be constrained to the available screen height minus the sticky header, so users can scroll through one complete card at a time. The video element must shrink/flex to fill remaining space rather than overflow below the fold.

quotes: make it so the whole video card is visible on mobile device. look at picture.

acceptanceCriteria: On a typical mobile viewport (e.g. 390x844 or 360x800), the full video card — header, title, video, and action row — is visible without scrolling within the card.
The video element uses object-fit: contain or cover and does not overflow below the bottom of the viewport.
Each card takes up exactly the available viewport height (100dvh minus header height), so users can scroll through one card at a time.
The layout works in both portrait and landscape mobile orientations.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change backend logic or data structures.
nonGoals: Redesigning the card visual style or color scheme.
Adding new card features (e.g., new action buttons, comments inline).
